operating_ranges.evidence: 1 x 1 kg bean hopper for single grinder configuration
1 x 0.5 kg bean hopper and 2 x 0.5 kg bean hoppers in various configurations

degradation_mechanisms.driven_by: exposure to air and improper storage
degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Only open bags of coffee beans with as much as you need for the day. Store coffee beans in a cool and dry place.

fault_conditions.name: hopper_empty_or_locked
fault_conditions.description: Bean hopper right is empty or locked
fault_conditions.symptoms: Please refill or unlock the bean hopper
fault_conditions.evidence: Error Code: S-010, Error Message: Bean hopper right is empty or locked.

fault_conditions.name: hopper_missing_left
fault_conditions.description: Bean hopper left/rear missing during process
fault_conditions.symptoms: Bean hopper removed during a process (e.g. during cleaning)
fault_conditions.evidence: E-000 - Bean hopper left missing (Cameo) / Bean hopper rear missing (Enigma/Shotmaster/E'line)

fault_conditions.name: hopper_missing_right
fault_conditions.description: Bean hopper right/front missing during process
fault_conditions.symptoms: Bean hopper removed during a process (e.g. during cleaning)
fault_conditions.evidence: E-001 - Bean hopper right missing (Cameo) / Bean hopper front missing (Enigma/Shotmaster/E'line)

maintenance_actions.name: daily_refill
maintenance_actions.evidence: Only open bags of coffee beans with as much as you need for the day

maintenance_actions.name: hopper_cleaning
maintenance_actions.evidence: Ensure that no foreign object get into the bean hopper(s). The grinder may be blocked or damaged.

assumptions.statement: Bean hoppers must be in locked/open position for grinding operation
assumptions.reason: Manual states 'When unlocked the bean hopper is loose, and it will not be possible to grind coffee (closed position)'

assumptions.statement: Different hopper positions have different capacities based on machine configuration
assumptions.reason: Manual shows varying capacities (0.5 kg, 1 kg, 1.2 kg, 0.6 kg) depending on grinder configuration and position
